TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Xiulin Itini i Hualien ko Xiulin Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 1,623.87 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 1,489.3 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 88.31 km²), 14,830 ko tamdaw i Xiulin Siyang, 4,504 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 13,244 a tamdaw, pakaala to 89%(Truku) no polong no tamdaw. o Truku ko sa'alomanay i Hualien. O kasaniyarona 9 ko cun, 18 ko niyaro' i Xiulin Siyang. Knlibu , Gukut , Tkijig , Bsngan , Pratan , Kdusan , Kulu , Tpuqu , Dowras , Bsuring , Kulu , Dowmung , Ibuh , Tmunan , Myawan , Branaw , Qowgan , Qnragan .
S.PHON: xio~u~uɾin itini i ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u xio~u~uɾin sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u *,***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u *,***.* km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i xio~u~uɾin sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u **,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tro~u~uko~u~u) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tro~u~uko~u~u ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i ħo~u~uaɾiən. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i xio~u~uɾin sijaŋ. knɾib~b~vo~u~u , *o~u~uko~u~ut , tkiji* , b~b~vsŋan , pratan , kɬ~ɮo~u~usan , ko~u~uɾo~u~u , tpo~u~u*o~u~u , ɬ~ɮo~uwras , b~b~vso~u~uriŋ , ko~u~uɾo~u~u , ɬ~ɮo~uwmo~u~uŋ , ib~b~vo~u~uħ , tmo~u~unan , mjawan , b~b~vranaw , *o~uw*an , *nra*an .
S.FORM: Xiulin Itini i Hualien ko Xiulin Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 1,623.87 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 1,489.3 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 88.31 km²), 14,830 ko tamdaw i Xiulin Siyang, 4,504 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 13,244 a tamdaw, pakaala to 89%(Truku) no polong no tamdaw. o Truku ko sa'alomanay i Hualien. O kasaniyarona 9 ko cun, 18 ko niyaro' i Xiulin Siyang. Knlibu , Gukut , Tkijig , Bsngan , Pratan , Kdusan , Kulu , Tpuqu , Dowras , Bsuring , Kulu , Dowmung , Ibuh , Tmunan , Myawan , Branaw , Qowgan , Qnragan .
S.PHON: xio~u~uɾin itini i ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u xio~u~uɾin sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u *,***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u *,***.* km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i xio~u~uɾin sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u **,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(tro~u~uko~u~u) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u tro~u~uko~u~u ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i ħo~u~uaɾiən. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i xio~u~uɾin sijaŋ. knɾib~b~vo~u~u , *o~u~uko~u~ut , tkiji* , b~b~vsŋan , pratan , kɬ~ɮo~u~usan , ko~u~uɾo~u~u , tpo~u~u*o~u~u , ɬ~ɮo~uwras , b~b~vso~u~uriŋ , ko~u~uɾo~u~u , ɬ~ɮo~uwmo~u~uŋ , ib~b~vo~u~uħ , tmo~u~unan , mjawan , b~b~vranaw , *o~uw*an , *nra*an .
